calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:30 am and concluding at 10:35 am.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A. appearing represented by John Phan, Esq.
Defendant Hugh G Graham is not present.

MARIANA ECHEVERRIA LICONA is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Electronic Record of Account Application
Exhibit 2: Cardholder Agreement and Changes in Terms
Exhibit 3: Account Statements

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A., and against Defendant Hugh G Graham, as follows:

1. Damages: $13,202.97

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $13,202.97
Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2023 Set For Trial On Nov-13-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
